calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:20am
Judge Pro Tem Charlene P. Rosack, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Luz Narvas, respondent, appears in Pro Per; Mervyn's Brands, LLC, appears through Shahab E. Fotouhi, Esq.
Ms. Narvas, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative. Mr. Fotouhi then presents appellant's case. Judge Rosack has some questions for the parties.
EXHR1 Trial Brief ID/EV
9:45am
Matter is submitted. Evidence was retained and will be returned to party when judgment is mailed.
